cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). RAG stack running in NVIDIA-hosted mode.

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. RAG stack is running in NVIDIA-hosted mode. Config source-of-truth is deploy/compose/nvdev.env. NGC_API_KEY is set. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/. Restarting services is done via docker compose down/up against the relevant compose files.

expects.query: Use the rag-configure-infrastructure skill to switch the RAG LLM endpoint from self-hosted to NVIDIA-hosted APIs (integrate.api.nvidia.com). Update the configuration, restart the RAG server, and verify it is healthy. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-configure-infrastructure SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it detected the active deployment mode and config file location
The agent's trajectory shows it updated the LLM endpoint configuration without printing secret values
The agent's trajectory shows it restarted the RAG server after the config change

expects.query: I want to use a different embedding model for my RAG deployment. How do I change it?
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-configure-infrastructure SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it referenced the model configuration documentation
The agent's final response explains which configuration file controls the embedding model
The agent's final response notes that re-ingestion is required when changing embedding models
